Privacy Policy

Last Updated: February 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to C.E.S.T.I.S LMS (Community Education, Skills Training & Intervention System). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our Learning Management System. By accessing or using C.E.S.T.I.S LMS, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

2. Information We Collect

Account Information: When an account is created for you or you register, we collect your full name, username, email address, password, and assigned role (administrator, instructor, admin staff, or student).

Student Profile Data: Students may provide additional information including student ID, phone number, emergency contact name, emergency contact phone number, and programme/course enrolment details.

Academic Records: We collect and store data related to your academic progress, including exam scores, grades, GPA, attendance records, certification status, assignment submissions, and training stage progress (Testing, Interview, In Training, Certified, Collected, Incomplete).

Communication Data: Messages sent through the LMS Chat feature, announcements, and support messages (including email address, phone number, and message content) are stored within the system.

Usage Data: We may collect information about how you interact with the system, including pages accessed, features used, and session activity for system improvement purposes.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use your personal information to:

  • Provide access to the LMS and its features based on your role
  • Track and manage student academic progress and training stages
  • Facilitate communication between students, instructors, and administrators
  • Generate academic reports, certificates, and attendance records
  • Manage online examinations and grade assessments
  • Schedule and conduct video conferences and class sessions
  • Send announcements, notifications, and calendar reminders
  • Respond to support requests and provide technical assistance
  • Maintain system security and manage user accounts

4. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored locally within your browser using localStorage and IndexedDB technologies. We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorised access, alteration, or disclosure. Passwords are stored within the system and users are encouraged to use strong, unique passwords.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Your data may be accessed by:

  • Administrators: System administrators can view all user accounts, student records, and system data for management purposes
  • Admin Staff: Administrative staff may access student data, attendance, and other information as permitted by the administrator
  • Instructors: Instructors can view their assigned students' progress, grades, and attendance

6. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access the personal information we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate personal data
  • Update your profile information (email, phone, emergency contacts)
  • Contact administration regarding any privacy concerns

7. Data Retention

We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide LMS services. Academic records, certificates, and attendance data may be retained for institutional record-keeping purposes even after your account is deactivated.

8. Children's Privacy

C.E.S.T.I.S LMS is designed for vocational training and educational purposes. If you are under the age of 18, your parent or guardian should be aware of and consent to your use of this system.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected by the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of the LMS after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

10. Contact Us

If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please contact the system administrator at cestisadmn@gmail.com / hazardstcadmn@gmail.com or use the Support feature on the login page.

Contact Support

Need help? Send a message directly to the administration team. Please provide your contact details so we can follow up with you.
